title: Personal Portfolio Website
description: Design and build a responsive personal portfolio website showcasing your projects, skills, and resume. Deploy it using a static hosting service.
learning_outcomes: Apply responsive CSS layouts with Flexbox and Grid
Implement interactive features with vanilla JavaScript
Deploy a static site to a hosting platform

title: Task Manager REST API
description: Create a RESTful API for a task management application with CRUD operations, user authentication, and input validation using FastAPI.

title: Dockerized Microservices Application
description: Decompose a monolithic application into microservices, containerize each with Docker, and orchestrate them using Docker Compose with shared networking.

title: Exploratory Data Analysis Dashboard
description: Perform end-to-end EDA on a real-world dataset and build an interactive dashboard to visualize trends, distributions, and correlations.

title: Stock Price Prediction Model
description: Build a machine learning model to predict stock price movements using historical data. Compare multiple algorithms and evaluate performance metrics.
learning_outcomes: Fetch and process financial time series data
Train and compare multiple ML algorithms
Evaluate models using RMSE, MAE, and R-squared

title: Sentiment Analysis Pipeline
description: Develop an NLP pipeline that classifies product reviews as positive, negative, or neutral using pre-trained transformer models and custom training.
learning_outcomes: Build an end-to-end NLP classification pipeline
Deploy a model as a REST API

title: Image Classification with CNNs
description: Train a convolutional neural network to classify images across multiple categories. Implement data augmentation, transfer learning, and model evaluation.
learning_outcomes: Build and train CNN architectures from scratch
Implement transfer learning with pre-trained models
Analyze model performance with confusion matrices

title: RAG-Powered Study Assistant
description: Build a retrieval-augmented generation chatbot that answers study questions by retrieving relevant content from a vector database of course materials.
learning_outcomes: Build a semantic search retrieval pipeline

title: Serverless URL Shortener
description: Deploy a serverless URL shortener on AWS Lambda with API Gateway, DynamoDB for storage, and CloudFront for caching and global delivery.

title: Kubernetes CI/CD Pipeline
description: Set up a complete CI/CD pipeline that builds, tests, and deploys a containerized application to a Kubernetes cluster with automated rollbacks.
learning_outcomes: Implement Helm charts for templated deployments
Configure automated health checks and rollbacks

title: Network Traffic Analyzer
description: Build a tool that captures and analyzes network traffic packets, detects anomalies, and generates security reports for potential threats.

title: Vulnerability Scanner Dashboard
description: Develop a web-based dashboard that aggregates vulnerability scan results, prioritizes risks, and tracks remediation progress across infrastructure.
learning_outcomes: Integrate security scanning tools into a web app
